title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Fortune Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Fortune Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Fortune Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fortune Hotels:
Fortune Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortune Hotels!
